structure.text:
Subject: NCP-P-2025-9-11 FY 2026 USDA Conditional Commitment Notice
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-09-11 13:57:41-07:00

 



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

USDA has announced a brief lapse in funding for the Single-Family Housing Guaranteed Loan Program, effective with the start of the new fiscal year, which begins Wednesday, October 1, 2025. Funding for the program will be unavailable for approximately one week. USDA anticipates this brief lapse in funding to continue for FY 2026. During the temporary lapse in funding, Rural Development - Rural Housing Service (RHS) will issue Conditional Commitments for purchase and refinance transactions. Please see the attachment for additional details. 

 

Questions may be directed to sfhgld.program@usda.gov <mailto:sfhgld.program@usda.gov>  or (833) 314-0168.

 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

For inquiries, contact:

 

Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>         Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com>         Product Department <mailto:Productdept@novahomeloans.com>
